CustomField.formula: IF(Quote_Grand_Total__c < 0, "(", "") & "$" & IF(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c) >= 1000000000, TEXT(FLOOR(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c) / 1000000000)) & "," & RIGHT("000" & TEXT(FLOOR(MOD(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c), 1000000000) / 1000000)), 3) & "," & RIGHT("000" & TEXT(FLOOR(MOD(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c), 1000000) / 1000)), 3) & "," & RIGHT("000" & TEXT(FLOOR(MOD(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c), 1000))), 3), IF(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c) >= 1000000, TEXT(FLOOR(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c) / 1000000)) & "," & RIGHT("000" & TEXT(FLOOR(MOD(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c), 1000000) / 1000)), 3) & "," & RIGHT("000" & TEXT(FLOOR(MOD(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c), 1000))), 3), IF(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c) >= 1000, TEXT(FLOOR(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c) / 1000)) & "," & RIGHT("000" & TEXT(FLOOR(MOD(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c), 1000))), 3), TEXT(FLOOR(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c))) ))) & "." & IF(MOD(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c), 1) * 100 < 10, "0" & TEXT(ROUND(MOD(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c), 1), 2) * 100), TEXT(MIN(ROUND(MOD(ABS(Quote_Grand_Total__c), 1), 2) * 100, 99)) ) & IF(Quote_Grand_Total__c < 0, ")", "")
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This allows us to show the Quote Grand Total in email templates with the correct currency formatting.
CustomField.label: Quote Grand Total for Email Template
